long_description:
NRE were alerted of link issues between cbs01.tl01.atl01 et-0/0/43 <-> cbs03.eq01.wdc02 et-0/0/13. Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19795
close_notes: Circuit is up. Provider is yet to perform the final fix
